_meta.description: FoxxeLabs project registry. Facts only — Claude derives priority ranking at session start.

weightings.note: Todd's current priority weightings for Claude to use in ranking

projects.name: Mnemos
projects.next_action: Implement hybrid retrieval layer (retrieval.py, SQLite FTS5 + ChromaDB RRF fusion)
projects.strategic_role: Memory infrastructure for all FoxxeLabs AI work
projects.notes: Deployed on Fly.io. Active backlog: hybrid retrieval standalone layer.

projects.name: Scéal
projects.next_action: Karaoke engine and TheInterview demo — continue pipeline development
projects.strategic_role: Standalone product — multi-voice audiobook generation using StyleTTS2
projects.notes: Running on Daisy (RTX 5060 OC, Ubuntu). Venv: /home/Projects/venvs/scEnv.

projects.name: Aislinge
projects.next_action: Phase 2 — generative replay, synthetic bridging documents
projects.strategic_role: Dream consolidation runtime — offline learning layer for the FoxxeLabs AI stack
projects.notes: Phase 1 complete and validated (17 Mar 2026). 12 clusters, coherent consolidated statements. Phase 3 ingests back into Mnemos as 'aislinge' source layer.

projects.name: UCA Dissertation
projects.blocked_by: Awaiting supervisor response to mindmap submission
projects.next_action: Wait for supervisor feedback, then proceed
projects.notes: Hard deadline 12 June 2026. Mindmap sent 19 Mar 2026.

projects.name: Legion
projects.next_action: Simulation phase — Isaac Sim 5.1.0 on Iris
projects.strategic_role: Core research — distributed AI swarm developing selfhood through developmental mechanisms
projects.notes: Deliberately slow-burn. IRC/SFI funding horizon 2026-2027. Peekaboo milestone target 2028-2029. Primary machine: Iris (RTX 5080, 128GB).

projects.name: Anseo
projects.next_action: Themes & Layouts system (design sketches ready); ElevenLabs hybrid TTS (45 min); Promotions/Stripe after that
projects.strategic_role: Community platform — social observation environment for Legion; standalone product
projects.notes: Django-based, deployed on Railway. Active branch: dev. Live platform.

projects.name: foxxelabs-astro
projects.notes: Astro v4, deployed on Cloudflare Pages. Auto-deploys on push (~2 min build time).

projects.name: ga-say
projects.next_action: Deploy to Cloudflare Pages as subdomain of sionnach.ie (and possibly sionnach.eu)
projects.strategic_role: Irish word pronunciation tool — companion to Sionnach
projects.notes: Simple static tool. About to deploy. Will live at e.g. pronounce.sionnach.ie.

projects.name: Radharc
projects.strategic_role: Geometry mapping layer — produces UMAP cache consumed by Aislinge
projects.notes: Operational. Produces radharc_cache.json for Aislinge consumption.

projects.name: UCAHub
projects.strategic_role: Public tracking site for UCA dissertation
projects.notes: Static site on Cloudflare Pages. noindex/nofollow while dissertation active.

projects.name: Agora
projects.strategic_role: Multi-persona debate engine — companion product to Sionnach
projects.notes: Single HTML file, Cloudflare Pages. Sionnach dependency complete. Summer 2026 target.

projects.name: Sionnach
projects.strategic_role: Browser-based historical persona engine — foundation for Agora and ga-say
projects.notes: Deployed. WebLLM/WebGPU, fully on-device. 18 personas across 6 collections.

projects.name: CyberSafer
projects.next_action: Decide on ICO registration and going public

projects.name: dirs
projects.next_action: Deploy on Iris when it comes online
projects.strategic_role: CLI utility — d_helper produces readable numbered list output from bash dirs
projects.notes: Mostly done. Essential quality-of-life tool. Remember to deploy on every new machine, especially Iris.

projects.name: git-mcp
projects.strategic_role: MCP server exposing git tools to Claude
projects.notes: Deployed on Fly.io. git_branch and git_checkout deployed. git_pull chokes on diverged branches.

projects.name: AfterWords / toddBot
projects.strategic_role: Digital legacy avatars — University of Souls concept

projects.name: glor
projects.notes: Dead project. Voice creation attempt that didn't work out. Repo retained for reference.
